result.reason: Enable users to easily migrate or synchronize application settings between different computers.
result.approach: Implement an import/export functionality for application settings. This will involve creating UI elements in the options window for selecting settings to export/import, serializing the selected settings to a portable format (e.g., XML or JSON), and deserializing them back into the application's settings system.
